---
title: "valkyrie.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\wardens\valkyrie.py"
loc: 37
complexity: 6
logic_score: 7.50
style_score: 3.86
intel_score: 3.56
overall_score: 3.61
---

## Intent
The `valkyrie.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on ValkyrieWarden, scan. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via ValkyrieWarden, scan. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [vulture](file://vulture)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.base](file://src.sentinel.wardens.base)

### Exports
- `ValkyrieWarden`
- `scan`
